title: Skyrim illumination
description: Feel the light vibe of Skyrim!
body:
# About
 A texture pack that modifies icons and panels in a Skyrim inspired style. The goal was not to replicate the Skyrim style or to convey in clarity everything like in the Skyrim game. The goal was to make a beautiful and pleasing interface that is reminiscent of the nostalgic Skyrim in spirit


 # Why is this still a beta?
 
 -At the moment, only the basic textures have been made. The textures for the Realms and network play panels have yet to be redrawn, and not everything that is approved at this point is the final version.
 
 # In the future:
 - I really love Skyrim, and if people like my texture pack, I'd be happy to add support for other mods.
 - I really want to make other versions of this texture pack. For example, light edition or gold.
 When all this will be realised, I won't say exactly.  Studying is taking up too much time, but as soon as I get it, I'll start working on it!

 # Preview
